questions.question: Design a UI component for a company's login page, considering human memory limitations. Explain how you ensured the component is easy to remember and use. (Approx. 150 words)

A user interface designer is given a set of design guidelines to follow for a new mobile app. However, the guidelines are not provided in a clear or easily understandable format. How would you plan and translate the guidelines to make them usable by the design team? (Approx. 100 words)

A user completes a feature request for a website, but their physical abilities are limited due to a disability. How would you design the feature to accommodate their needs, and what assessment would you make to ensure the feature is usable for all users? (Approx. 150 words)
